title: Solar Design System from Sunrise
content: Solar from Directories: Components: Solar Design System equips Sunrise digital teams with reusable web components and design elements. It offers a centralized framework for consistent, high-quality user experiences across all platforms. Solar includes foundational guidelines, component specifications, and best practice patterns, streamlining collaboration between designers and developers. By providing essential tools and resources, Sunrise Design System accelerates the development process, ensuring cohesive and efficient design solutions throughout digital ecosystem.
